title: Security Audit Prompt
prompt: Review this codebase for security vulnerabilities. Focus on: XSS via innerHTML/insertAdjacentHTML without escaping, missing escapeAttr() on dynamic HTML attributes, unsafe eval/Function constructors, prototype pollution vectors, insecure target='_blank' links missing rel='noopener'. For each finding, provide severity (high/medium/low), the file and line, a description, and a fix.

title: Pattern Consistency Review
prompt: Review this codebase for pattern consistency. Check: Are all event handlers using data-attribute pattern (not inline onclick with interpolation)? Are all dynamic values escaped with _esc()? Are CSS variables used instead of hardcoded colors? Are shared components used instead of custom implementations? List each inconsistency with file, description, and suggested fix.

title: Nightly Review Summary Generator
prompt: Generate a concise summary of tonight's code review findings. Include: total files reviewed, critical findings count, patterns discovered, and key learnings. Format as a brief paragraph suitable for a dashboard card, followed by a bullet list of the top 3 most important findings.
